Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
Response:
Hi there! I understand you'd like to pause your subscription. According to our documentation, you can follow these steps:

1. Access Subscription Settings: Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and select Settings from the dropdown menu.
2. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription.
3. Initiate Pause Subscription: Click the Cancel Plan button. The UI will display a prompt about the new Pause Subscription feature.
4. Select the desired pause duration:
	 Minimum: 1 month
	 Maximum: 12 months
5. Confirm Pause: Click Confirm Pause. A confirmation message will appear, displaying the pause duration and the automatic resume date.

Please note that you can cancel your subscription at any time, and when you do, cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle. You'll receive a confirmation email with the cancellation date.

Reference: Cancel Subscription Cancelling subscription (hackerrank/settings/user-account-settings-and-preferences/3131912618-cancel-subscription.md)

Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
Subject: Employee leaving the company
Response:
To remove an employee from your Hackerrank hiring account, follow these steps:

1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials.
2. Select your profile icon in the upper-right corner.
3. Select Teams Management from the drop-down menu.
4. Go to the Teams tab.
5. Select the team you want to update.
6. Select the Users tab to add team members, update their roles, or remove team members.
7. Locate the user in the list and select the delete icon in the Action column.

This will remove the employee from your Hackerrank hiring account.

Reference: Manage Team Members Prerequisite Managing team members (hackerrank/settings/teams-management/2203617737-manage-team-members.md)

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
Response:
I'd be happy to help you with setting up a Claude LTI key for your students. 

To set up an LTI key in Claude, please follow these steps:

1. Log in to your Claude account and navigate to the "Organization settings" page.
2. Click on the "LTI keys" tab.
3. Click the "Create LTI key" button.
4. Fill out the required information for the LTI key, including the key name, description, and authentication URL.

If you need further assistance or have any questions about setting up an LTI key in Claude, please don't hesitate to reach out to our Support team.
